scripts.build: rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && find .next-build -name '* 2*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; LOOM_DIST_DIR=.next-build next build && find .next-build -name '* 2*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; node scripts/pagefind-if-html.mjs .next-build/server/app public/pagefind
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && LOOM_SMOKE_CHAT=1 npm run smoke
scripts.knowledge:refresh: npm run ingest && npm run search && npm run rag && npm run knowledge:prune
scripts.app: cd macos-app/Loom && rm -rf 'Loom 2.xcodeproj' && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Loom.xcodeproj -scheme Loom -configuration Debug build && rm -rf /Applications/Loom.app && cp -R ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/Loom-*/Build/Products/Debug/Loom.app /Applications/Loom.app && rm -rf ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/Loom-*/Build/Products/Debug/Loom.app && echo '✓ Loom.app installed'
